The Residence

Timeless craftsmanship with Mohawk Valley views

Welcome to 1715 Sherman Drive, a truly exceptional architect-designed residence nestled on nearly two acres of beautifully landscaped grounds in one of the area's most prestigious settings. Designed by renowned architect Verne Swan, this timeless brick and cedar home blends classic craftsmanship with modern comfort while offering breathtaking views of the Mohawk Valley. A circular driveway welcomes you to over 4,200 square feet of thoughtfully designed living space.

Features & Setting

Every detail, considered

Architect-Designed

A timeless brick and cedar home by renowned architect Verne Swan, full of custom millwork and character.

Two Fireplaces

A spectacular living room with a wood-burning fireplace and a richly paneled library/bar with a second fireplace.

Original Oak Floors

Rochester oak hardwood floors and exceptional architectural details create warmth throughout.

Spacious Primary Suite

A generous primary suite with abundant closet space and built-ins, plus three additional bedrooms.

Basement Sauna

Unwind in the private sauna, one of many thoughtful comforts throughout the home.

Nearly 2 Private Acres

A tranquil patio, mature gardens, and picturesque surroundings that provide exceptional privacy.
